user.title: Connect to your Axis door controller
user.description: Enter the controller's address and an administrator account. Lock actions require an Admin user.

discovery_confirm.title: Add Axis door controller
discovery_confirm.description: Enter administrator credentials for the controller discovered at {host}.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the controller.

init.title: Axis door controller options
init.description: Access codes (PINs/cards) are shared across the whole controller cluster. Enable management on just one controller to expose the code-management actions there.

data.manage_codes: Manage access codes from this controller

add_pin.name: Add PIN
add_pin.description: Creates a cardholder and a PIN credential on the cluster, optionally granting one or more access profiles. PINs are stored as plain digits on the controller.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through (any controller reaches the shared cluster database).

name.name: Cardholder name
name.description: Display name for the new cardholder, e.g. "Doe, Jane".

pin.name: PIN
pin.description: The PIN digits for this credential.

access_profile_tokens.name: Access profiles
access_profile_tokens.description: Tokens of the access profiles this PIN should be granted. Leave empty to create a code that opens nothing yet. Use 'List access profiles' to find tokens.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the credential is active immediately.

remove_credential.name: Remove credential
remove_credential.description: Deletes a credential (PIN/card) from the cluster by its token.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

credential_token.name: Credential token
credential_token.description: Token of the credential to remove.

set_credential_enabled.name: Enable or disable credential
set_credential_enabled.description: Enables or disables an existing credential without deleting it.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

credential_token.name: Credential token
credential_token.description: Token of the credential to change.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Set to on to enable, off to disable.

list_credentials.name: List credentials
list_credentials.description: Returns the cluster's credentials (cardholder, enabled state, granted profiles).

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

include_pins.name: Include PIN values
include_pins.description: Include the plain-text PIN of each credential in the response. Handle with care.

list_access_profiles.name: List access profiles
list_access_profiles.description: Returns the cluster's access profiles and their tokens, for use with 'Add PIN'.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.
